sections.paragraph: m. a chest, coffer, hanging at the sides of a vehicle, 1Sa 6:8, 11 1Sa 6:11, 15 1Sa 6:15, for רְגָז (with Aleph prosthetic), from the root רָגַז to tremble, wag, move to and fro; whence in Arabic رِجَازَةُ a bag filled with stones, hung at the sides of camels, in order to preserve equilibrium.
